content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms from autonomous ICM-equipped agents can be repurposed to dynamically prioritize which new unlabeled data gets stored and compressed in cutting-edge 2024-2025 active learning agent memory architectures, pruning low-novelty data before it consumes limited memory capacity. Only data that triggers the agent's intrinsic curiosity signal (a measurement of prediction error) gets encoded into long-term memory for future downstream active learning queries.
